stemHtml:
(For this question use CAP 698 Figure 4.31 or refer to figure).
Determine the advised cooling schedule and minimum brake cooling time after landing for the following performance data:

Estimated landing mass: 90 000 lb
VREF: 125 kt
Corrections to VREF for landing speed: (VREF – 3 kt)
Corrections to VREF for wind component: minus 50% of a headwind or plus 150% for a tailwind
Headwind component: 4 kt
Pressure Altitude: 2000 ft
OAT: + 10°C
Braking configuration: Autobrake 2
Reverse Thrust: Normal #2 Detent
Taxi miles: 4 miles

Add one million foot pounds for each taxi mile to obtain total energy.

options.a: Cooling Schedule II, cooling recommended, recommended 8 minutes ground cooling before take-off.
options.b: Cooling Schedule II, cooling recommended, recommended 16 minutes ground cooling before take-off.
options.c: Cooling Schedule II, cooling recommended, recommended 25 minutes ground cooling before take-off.
options.d: Cooling Schedule I normal, NO special cooling procedure required.
